title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google revealed DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a different approach and can run up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. The model features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion-based approach rather than standard autoregressive decoding. It matters because the diffusion method reportedly runs up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs, shifting how text generation handles speed and compute. Concrete takeaways: the model works over a 256-token canvas and includes self-correction during generation, and it touches on test-time compute and local inference.
